summary: Post-restore verification complete. Frontend restored from commit 31a38bb is working correctly. All 18 backend API tests passed. All 7 frontend UI tests passed.
passed_tests: Backend: /api/config/locale returns 200 with countries, languages, currencies
Backend: /api/config/locale includes ES and EN languages
Backend: /api/auth/me returns user data with valid session
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly with products
Frontend: Login page has email/password form and Google option
Frontend: Login with admin credentials redirects to /super-admin
Frontend: Register page shows complete form with Country field
Frontend: Register page shows consent section for customers
Frontend: Language dropdown (ES/EN) works in header
Frontend: Certificates page loads and shows products
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend restoration from commit 31a38bb was successful
All core functionality is working: auth, products, locale, certificates
Language dropdown shows 11 languages including ES and EN
AI Assistant (Hispalo AI) is visible on homepage and admin pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend was restored from commit 31a38bb after a failed sed refactor corrupted ~50 files. All basic functionality verified working: homepage, login, register, certificates, language dropdown. Backend APIs all returning correct responses. AI Assistant (Hispalo AI) visible on non-auth pages.

homepage.details: Loads correctly, shows products, AI Assistant visible

login_page.details: Email/password form works, Google option available, admin login redirects to /super-admin

register_page.details: Complete form with Country field, consent section for customers, role selection (Customer/Producer)

auth_api.details: Login works with admin credentials, session management working

language_dropdown.details: Shows 11 languages: English, Chinese, Spanish, Hindi, Arabic, French, Portuguese, Russian, German, Japanese, Korean

certificates_page.details: Loads products list, shows 10 verified products with certifications
